zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Caunton於1335年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾考頓時，她的父親Sir John Whitmore de Caunton26歲，母親Joan de Caunton26歲。她於1360年與Sir Robert Markham結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1368年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Caunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Taunton in Somerset. The place takes its name from the river Tone (the name of which is related to the Indo-European root tā-, tə- ‘melt, flow’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Tanton
meanings: English (mainly Devon and Kent): variant of   Taunton  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Caunton was born in 1335, in Caunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Whitmore de Caunton, was 26 and her mother, Joan de Caunton, was 26. She married Sir Robert Markham in 1360. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1368, in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33, and was buried in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Caunton est née en 1335, à Caunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Whitmore de Caunton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan de Caunton, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Markham en 1360. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1368, à Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Caunton 1335 in Caunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Whitmore de Caunton 26 und ihre Mutter Joan de Caunton 26. Sie hat 1360 Sir Robert Markham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1368 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Cauntonが1335年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアカウントンで生まれた時，父Sir John Whitmore de Cauntonは26歳，母Joan de Cauntonは26歳であった。1360年にSir Robert Markhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1368年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアマークハム クリントンで33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアマークハム クリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Caunton(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 카운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Whitmore de Caunton(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Caunton(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1360년 Sir Robert Markham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 마카 클린턴에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 마카 클린턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Caunton родилась в 1335 г. в местности каунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Whitmore de Caunton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Caunton, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Markham в 1360 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1368 г. в местности мархам клинтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности мархам клинтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
